A case provider's own config loads inside its case arm, so unselected
implementations cost nothing; the selector's config is reused.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config => CONFIGDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- store/store.go --
package store

//fabrik:config store
type Config struct {
	Kind string `yaml:"kind" default:"memory"`
}

//fabrik:config postgres
type PostgresConfig struct {
	DSN string `yaml:"dsn"`
}

//fabrik:provider:select store.kind
type Store interface {
	Get(key string) string
}

type Memory struct{}

func (*Memory) Get(key string) string { return key }

//fabrik:provider case=memory
func NewMemory(c *Config) *Memory { return &Memory{} }

type Postgres struct{}

func (*Postgres) Get(key string) string { return key }

//fabrik:provider case=postgres
func NewPostgres(c *PostgresConfig) (*Postgres, error) { return &Postgres{}, nil }
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"net/http"

	"app/store"
)

type Handlers struct {
	Store store.Store
}

//fabrik:http GET /
func (h *Handlers) Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"os"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"

	"app/store"
	"app/web"
)

func run() int {
	if err := func() error {
		// Config
		fabrikEnv := os.Getenv("FABRIK_ENV")
		switch fabrikEnv {
		case "development", "production":
		default:
			if fabrikEnv == "" {
				return fmt.Errorf("FABRIK_ENV is required: development or production")
			}
			return fmt.Errorf("invalid FABRIK_ENV %q: want development or production", fabrikEnv)
		}
		fabrikConfigOpts := []config.Option{
			config.FileOptional("config.yaml"),
			config.File("config." + fabrikEnv + ".yaml"),
		}
		if fabrikEnv == "development" {
			fabrikConfigOpts = append(fabrikConfigOpts, config.FileOptional("config.local.yaml"))
		}
		storeConfig, err := config.Load[store.Config](append(fabrikConfigOpts,
			config.KnownSections("postgres", "store"),
			config.Section("store"),
		)...)
		if err != nil {
			return err
		}

		// Providers
		// store.Store, selected by store.kind
		var storeStore store.Store
		switch storeConfig.Kind {
		case "memory":
			storeStore = store.NewMemory(storeConfig)
		case "postgres":
			storePostgresConfig, err := config.Load[store.PostgresConfig](append(fabrikConfigOpts,
				config.KnownSections("postgres", "store"),
				config.Section("postgres"),
			)...)
			if err != nil {
				return err
			}
			storeStorePostgres, err := store.NewPostgres(storePostgresConfig)
			if err != nil {
				return err
			}
			storeStore = storeStorePostgres
		default:
			return fmt.Errorf("no store.Store implementation for %q", storeConfig.Kind)
		}
		webHandlers := &web.Handlers{
			Store: storeStore,
		}

		r := router.New()

		// Register
		r.Method("GET", "/", webHandlers.Index)
		return nil
	}(); err != nil {
		fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "app:", err)
		return 1
	}
	return 0
}
